settings.heading: Business Gifting Solutions
settings.subtitle: Impress clients, reward employees, and celebrate milestones with premium curated gift baskets tailored to your brand.

settings.title: Preparing for Gifting Success
settings.content: Corporate gifting shouldn't be complicated. Our team works with you to understand your goals, select the right gifts, and deliver them with care. Whether you're celebrating a milestone, onboarding new clients, or sending holiday gifts to your team, we make the process seamless from start to finish.

settings.title: Business Gift Specialists
settings.content:
A dedicated team of gift specialists ready to help you create memorable corporate gifts. We handle everything from custom engraving and branded packaging to multi-address shipping and last-minute orders.

  • Personalized Engraving — Add names, logos, or messages to bottles and accessories
  • Branded Packaging — Include your company logo and custom messaging
  • Bulk Order Support — Streamlined ordering for teams of any size
  • Flexible Delivery — Ship to one address or hundreds across the country
Over a decade of curating premium gift experiences for businesses of all sizes.
Premium gifts at approachable price points that leave a lasting impression with any budget.
Thousands of 5-star reviews from satisfied corporate clients across the country.

settings.title: Greeting Cards and Customization
settings.content: Every great gift deserves a personal message. Include a custom greeting card with each basket, or let us help you design branded cards with your company logo and messaging. From handwritten notes to printed inserts, we make sure your gift feels truly personal.

settings.title: Custom Greeting Cards
settings.content: Personalize your message with branded cards designed to match your company's style.

settings.title: Branded Gift Tags
settings.content: Add your company logo and a short message to elegant gift tags included with every basket.

settings.title: Photo Insert Cards
settings.content: Upload team photos or event images for a truly one-of-a-kind gifting experience.
Everything you need to make your gift baskets one-of-a-kind.

settings.title: Your Gifts Your Way
settings.content: With our Build Your Own Basket system you can tailor every aspect of your gift.

settings.title: Business Gifts That Impress
settings.content: Browse our most popular corporate gift baskets — perfect for clients, employees, and special occasions.

settings.title: What type of corporate gifts do you offer?
settings.content: We offer a wide range of premium gift baskets featuring fine wines, craft spirits, gourmet snacks, coffee, and more. Each gift can be customized with engravings, branded packaging, and personalized greeting cards. Whether you need a single impressive gift or hundreds of baskets for a company event, we have options for every occasion and budget.

settings.title: Can I add my company logo to the gifts?
settings.content: Absolutely! We offer custom branding options including logo-printed gift tags, branded greeting cards, and the option to include your own company swag in the basket. We can also remove our branding and replace it with yours at no additional cost.

settings.title: How does bulk ordering and multi-address shipping work?
settings.content: You can place a single order and ship to multiple addresses. Simply provide your recipient list to our team and we'll handle the rest. You can upload addresses via spreadsheet, set different delivery dates, and track every shipment from a single dashboard. We support ground, 2-day, and overnight shipping options.

settings.title: What is the turnaround time for corporate orders?
settings.content: Standard corporate orders ship within 2-3 business days. For large bulk orders (50+ baskets), we recommend placing your order at least 1-2 weeks in advance. Need a rush order? Contact our team and we'll do everything we can to accommodate your timeline.

settings.title: Do you offer alcohol-free gift options?
settings.content: Yes! We have a wide selection of alcohol-free gift baskets featuring gourmet coffee, artisan snacks, chocolates, and other premium items. These are great options for offices with diverse preferences or situations where alcohol isn't appropriate.

settings.title: Is there a minimum order for corporate gifting?
settings.content: There is no minimum order requirement. Whether you need one gift or one thousand, we provide the same level of care and customization. However, orders of 10+ baskets qualify for our dedicated account manager service with priority support.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.content: Everything you need to know about our corporate gifting services.
settings.support_hours: Our corporate gifting team is available Monday to Friday: 8am-6pm PST.
